channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Patrick Mahomes throws for 331 yards, Derek Carr hurt as Chiefs shut down Saints for 26-13 victory
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Patrick Mahomes threw for a bunch of yards. Travis Kelce caught a whole lot of his passes. And Kareem Hunt plowed into the end zone once again, sending a torrent of red fireworks flying over Arrowhead Stadium on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Saints quarterback Derek Carr leaves with oblique injury in another losing night against the Chiefs
item.description: Saints quarterback Derek Carr was having another tough time against the Chiefs even before he took a wicked shot from blitzing defensive back Chamarri Conner, not only ending his game but also New Orleans’ hopes of a comeback.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Colorado Mesa football took down Goliath in program-changing win
item.description: It was an improbable 14-13 home upset victory over fourth-ranked 4-0 Colorado School of Mines. The same team that beat them 52-0 at Stocker Stadium a year ago.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: NCAA's $2.78 billion settlement with colleges to allow athlete payments gets preliminary approval
item.description: A judge granted preliminary approval Monday to the $2.78 billion legal settlement that would transform college sports by allowing schools to pay players. U.S.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tigers' Kerry Carpenter hits go-ahead 3-run homer to lift Detroit to Game 2 victory
item.description: Kerry Carpenter hit a three-run home run in the ninth inning to help the Detroit Tigers to a Game 2 victory over the Cleveland Guardians on Monday evening.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Taylor Swift is back to watch Travis Kelce and the Chiefs with Eras Tour soon to resume
item.description: Taylor Swift has returned to Arrowhead Stadium to see her boyfriend Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs play the New Orleans Saints.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Carpenter's 3-run homer off Clase sends gritty Tigers to 3-0 win over Guardians in Game 2 of ALDS
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Kerry Carpenter hit a three-run homer off Cleveland's All-Star closer Emmanuel Clase in the ninth inning, and the Detroit Tigers stunned the Guardians 3-0 in Game 2 on Monday to even their AL Division Series at one game apiece.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Aaron Rodgers needs to step up as Jets remain stagnant
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The Jets are 2-3. All the criticism is justified. They do not appear to be a group that is getting better week in and week out, they look to be rotting away. Talk of the relationship between the head coach Robert Saleh and quarterback Aaron Rodgers.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Vikings remember 'reprehensible' Oct. 7 attacks on Israel
item.description: The Minnesota Vikings are among those who reflect and mourn the lives lost on the one-year anniversary of the Hamas terrorist attacks on Israel, as they issued a statement on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NCAA's $2.78 billion settlement with colleges to allow athlete payments gets preliminary approval
item.description: A judge has given preliminary approval to the $2.78 billion legal settlement that figures to transform college sports.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: IndyCar partners with Dallas Cowboys and Texas Rangers for 2026 street race in Arlington
item.description: IndyCar will return to Texas in 2026 with a street race in Arlington in a joint venture between the Dallas Cowboys and the official events partner of the Texas Rangers.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Manny Machado rips Dodgers' Jack Flaherty, says pitcher hit Padres teammate on purpose
item.description: San Diego Padres star Manny Machado called out Los Angeles Dodgers starter Jack Flaherty, who he believes hit Fernando Tatis Jr. with a pitch on purpose.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What is Freddie Freeman's status for NLDS Game 3?
item.description: Perhaps the most understated but significant development in Sunday night’s emotionally charged National League Division Series game between San Diego and Los Angeles was the departure of Dodgers first baseman Freddie Freeman.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Jets QB Rodgers dealing with a low ankle sprain, but Saleh says he should be fine to play
item.description: New York Jets quarterback Aaron Rodgers has a sprained lower left ankle but should be able to play against Buffalo next Monday night, coach Robert Saleh said.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fritz and Dimitrov finally advance at rain-soaked Shanghai Masters
item.description: SHANGHAI (AP) — Two days after starting, seventh-ranked Taylor Fritz and 10th-ranked Grigor Dimitrov finally got to complete their second-round matches at the Shanghai Masters on Monday. Fritz, the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LeBron and son Bronny James play together for the first time in a preseason game for the Lakers
item.description: PALM DESERT, Calif. (AP) — LeBron James grew up without a father, and the top scorer in NBA history has often said he savors every moment and milestone he can experience with his own three children.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dodger Stadium fans toss balls and trash on field, interrupt Padres' 10-2 win that evens NLDS
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans threw baseballs in the direction of San Diego left fielder Jurickson Profar and then tossed trash that caused a lengthy delay before the Padres beat the Los Angeles Dodgers 10-2 on Sunday night to even their NL Division Series at a game apiece.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kevin Yu birdies 18th twice and wins Sanderson Farms in playoff for first PGA Tour title
item.description: Kevin Yu made a 15-foot birdie on the 18th hole for a 5-under 67, and he birdied it again from 6 feet in a playoff to beat Beau Hossler and win the Sanderson Farms Championship on Sunday for his first PGA Tour title.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NASCAR playoffs roll into Talladega as cloud of lawsuit hangs over sport
item.description: It's most fitting that NASCAR this weekend races at Talladega Superspeedway, the sight of one of the first major disputes between drivers and the top stock car series in the United States.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Lane Thomas hits 3-run homer, Cleveland's bullpen torments Tigers as Guardians win ALDS opener 7-0
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Lane Thomas hit a three-run homer in a five-run outburst before Detroit got an out, and the Cleveland Guardians unleashed their lights-out bullpen to complete a four-hitter in a 7-0 win over the Tigers in an AL Division Series opener on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: LeBron James reveals why he joined the Lakers
item.description: The NBA season is right around the corner, but the league's oldest player still had some time on his hands on Saturday morning.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Here's where SoFi ranks among NFL's best (and worst) stadiums
item.description: SoFi Stadium in Inglewood is not the best stadium in the NFL but it did crack the top five, according to a survey released Thursday. Lumen Field, the home of the Seattle Seahawks, was named the best stadium for football fans to visit in USA Today's rankings of all NFL stadiums.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: Mets advance in playoffs with 4-2 win over Brewers
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Pete Alonso hit a go-ahead, three-run homer off All-Star closer Devin Williams in the ninth inning and the New York Mets beat the Milwaukee Brewers 4-2 on Thursday night to win their NL Wild Card Series.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Grand Junction softball pours it on Palisade for big league win
item.description: With a clear blue sky and beautiful Mt. Garfield as the backdrop at Palisade High School, it was the Grand Junction Tigers show on the softball field.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: How two Central football players are working to get recruited
item.description: A pair of local high school football stars -- Central High School's Jaime Padilla and Antonio Reyes -- are doing everything they can, even traveling the country to show college football programs what they can do.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Bucs look to build on division lead against the Falcons on Thursday Night Football | Bucs Bonus
item.description: Tampa Bay is looking to build on their early division lead during their Thursday Night Football matchup against the rival Atlanta Falcons.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Legendary Dodgers pitcher, broadcaster Fernando Valenzuela hospitalized
item.description: Dodgers broadcaster Fernando Valenzuela has been hospitalized ahead of the team's playoff run. The popular Spanish-language broadcaster and former Dodger star pitcher stepped away from his playcalling duties last week, though no reason was given at the time, according to the Orange County Register.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5
